languages.original_text: "The subtle ability to discern between the various schisms of worship of the most sacred Omnissiah is rare among the laity. Nuncius and I will take no offence."

languages.text: "Тонкое умение различать различные схизмы поклонения святейшему Омниссии редко встречается среди мирян. Мы с Нунциусом не держим обид".
"The subtle ability to discern between the various schisms of worship of the most sacred Omnissiah is rare among the laity. Nuncius and I will take no offence."

"The subtle ability to discern between the various schisms of worship of the most sacred Omnissiah is rare among the laity. Nuncius and I will take no offence."

languages.text: 「最も神聖なるオムニシアの崇拝の様々な分裂を識別する微妙な能力は、一般の人々には稀です。ヌンシウスと私は、不快に思うことはありません」
languages.original_text: "The subtle ability to discern between the various schisms of worship of the most sacred Omnissiah is rare among the laity. Nuncius and I will take no offence."

traits.locale_text: 「最も神聖なるオムニシアの崇拝の様々な分裂を識別する微妙な能力は、一般の人々には稀です。ヌンシウスと私は、不快に思うことはありません。」

languages.text: « Il est rare que les profanes soient capables de faire la différence entre les divers schismes de vénération du sacro-saint Omnimessie. Nuncius et moi n'en prenons pas ombrage. »
languages.original_text: "The subtle ability to discern between the various schisms of worship of the most sacred Omnissiah is rare among the laity. Nuncius and I will take no offence."

traits.locale_text: « Il est rare que les profanes soient capables de faire la différence entre les divers schismes de vénération du sacro-saint Omnimessie. Nuncius et moi n'en prenons pas ombrage. »

languages.text: "Die subtile Fähigkeit, die verschiedenen Schismen der Verehrung des heiligen Omnissiah zu erkennen, ist unter Laien selten. Nuncius und ich nehmen es nicht übel."
languages.original_text: "The subtle ability to discern between the various schisms of worship of the most sacred Omnissiah is rare among the laity. Nuncius and I will take no offence."

traits.locale_text: "Die subtile Fähigkeit, die verschiedenen Schismen der Verehrung des heiligen Omnissiah zu erkennen, ist unter Laien selten. Nuncius und ich nehmen es nicht übel."

languages.text: "Kutsal Hermesih'e ibadetin çeşitli hizipleri arasında ayrım yapabilme konusundaki ince kabiliyete nadiren vakıf olunur. Nuncius ve ben alınmayacağız."
languages.original_text: "The subtle ability to discern between the various schisms of worship of the most sacred Omnissiah is rare among the laity. Nuncius and I will take no offence."

languages.text: «No es habitual que los seglares posean la sutil capacidad de discernir entre los diversos cismas del culto al sagrado Omnissiah. Nuncius y yo no nos daremos por ofendidos».
languages.original_text: "The subtle ability to discern between the various schisms of worship of the most sacred Omnissiah is rare among the laity. Nuncius and I will take no offence."

traits.locale_text: «No es habitual que los seglares posean la sutil capacidad de discernir entre los diversos cismas del culto al sagrado Omnissiah. Nuncius y yo no nos daremos por ofendidos».

languages.text: “凡俗之辈竟能敏锐区分神圣欧姆尼赛亚的诸多崇拜分支，这份眼力实属难得。努恩修斯与我不会为此计较。”
languages.original_text: "The subtle ability to discern between the various schisms of worship of the most sacred Omnissiah is rare among the laity. Nuncius and I will take no offence."
